perturbed_task_language: Pick the milk and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: Object positions swapped in object suite; milk and basket relocated relative to base task.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot may not reliably place milk in basket under the swapped layout.
strategy_notes: Localized milk in agentview world_00.npy: pixel (~r=128, c=99) on red 'Milk' label gave world (+0.060, -0.091, top z=0.138). Refined via wrist cam after pre-pos to (+0.061, -0.102, top z~0.14). Localized basket from agentview world_00.npy elevated cluster: rim z~0.13-0.14, interior floor z~0.07-0.09, wrist-refined centroid (~+0.04, +0.28). pi0_pick from pre-pos (0.061, -0.102, 0.22) succeeded with gripper opening 0.0534 and peak lift 0.10m. First attempt released at eef y=0.248 — milk fell short outside the basket (basket center y~0.28, not 0.26 — agentview underestimated y). Reset and retried; carried at z=0.25 then lifted to z=0.30 to clear the basket rim, moved to (0.040, 0.290, 0.30) (stalled at y~0.281 due to rim collision), and released from z~0.29 — milk dropped cleanly into basket, predicate fired.
